title: Film Script Analysis
description: Reading a screenplay alongside the finished film — what survived, what changed, why.
summary_pt_br: Análise de roteiro: leia o script, assista o filme, compare cena a cena. As diferenças ensinam mais.

scenes.subtitle_en: Reading a screenplay alongside the finished film — what survived, what changed, why.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Análise de roteiro: leia o script, assista o filme, compare cena a cena. As diferenças ensinam mais.

scenes.text_en: Reading a screenplay alongside the finished film — what survived, what changed, why. Focus: film script analysis. Read the screenplay before you watch the finished film.
scenes.text_pt: Análise de roteiro: leia o script, assista o filme, compare cena a cena. As diferenças ensinam mais. Foco: film script analysis. Leia o roteiro antes de ver o filme pronto.

scenes.title: Film Script Analysis
scenes.body_en: Script method: read the screenplay first. Watch the film. Compare scene-by-scene: what was cut, what was added, what moved. The differences teach more than either alone.
scenes.body_pt: Análise de roteiro: leia o script, assista o filme, compare cena a cena. As diferenças ensinam mais.

examples.en: Read the screenplay before you watch the finished film.
examples.pt: Leia o roteiro antes de ver o filme pronto.

examples.en: Every cut scene once seemed essential — ask why it didn't survive.
examples.pt: Toda cena cortada já pareceu essencial — por que não sobreviveu?

examples.en: The differences between script and film teach more than either alone.
examples.pt: As diferenças ensinam mais que qualquer um sozinho.

exercise.question: Complete: "Read the ___ before you watch the finished film."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Read the screenplay before you watch the finished film."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Leia o roteiro antes de ver o filme pronto.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Every cut scene once seemed essential — ask why it didn't survive.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Every cut scene once seemed essential — ask why it didn't survive."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Toda cena cortada já pareceu essencial — por que não sobreviveu?

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Film Script Analysis — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre film script analysis. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Rafa — film script method. First step?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Read the screenplay before the film.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Watch the film in one sitting.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Compare scene by scene — what changed?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Cuts are about rhythm, not content.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Script vs film is a master class in editing.

scenes.title: The screenplay workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three comparison moves. Use at least three screenplay terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the small screenwriting club, Rafa handed each member the same screenplay and the same Blu-ray on the same Tuesday.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Read the screenplay before you watch the finished film — the order matters far more than people believe.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: Every cut scene once seemed essential to the writer — and the question is why it didn't survive the final edit.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: The differences between script and film teach you more than either one could teach you read or watched alone.

paragraphs.speaker: Member
paragraphs.en: Pacing cuts are the hardest to predict — the writer loves those scenes, and the editor removes them anyway.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Script-to-film comparison, Rafa believed, is a master class in the one skill every writer needs — knowing what to cut.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Film Script Analysis". Reading a screenplay alongside the finished film — what survived, what changed, why. Read the screenplay before you watch the finished film. Every cut scene once seemed essential — ask why it didn't survive. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Film Script Analysis". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Film Script Analysis".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Film Script Analysis".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
